release_notes: Native Windows Toast Notifications & Duplicate Agent Notification Fix: integrates pystray OS toast notifications for minimized desktop app, and fixes duplicate agent chat alerts by consolidating WebUI notification dispatch.

changes.note: Removed redundant server-side WebSocket notification creation.
Added notify interface to TrayIcon using pystray.
Added window visibility tracking, native notification handler, and 10s cooldown.
Added listener callback system to NotificationManager.
Wired NotificationManager listener to DesktopController native notifications.
Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.4.5.
